perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a grey top stands in the bakery aisle of a Costco, holding a clear plastic container of Vienna red bean milk dinner rolls. She speaks enthusiastically to the camera while gesturing toward the product. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting where the same woman and another woman wearing a patterned bucket hat sit at a table. They open the container and take out the rolls. (3) Close-up shots show the rolls being pulled apart and sliced in half to reveal a light-colored red bean cream filling. The women point at the filling-to-bread ratio and take bites, expressing their reactions through facial expressions and hand gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin, introducing the new bread item found at Costco. Ambient supermarket noises like carts and distant chatter are audible. (2) A second female voice joins as they transition to a home setting. Upbeat, light-tempo acoustic background music starts playing. The sound of plastic crinkling is heard as they open the bread container. (3) The primary speaker describes the texture and taste, while the second woman adds comments. Sounds of chewing and occasional laughter are present. The music remains consistent until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top throughout. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Bright yellow and orange captions read '維也納 紅豆牛奶餐包' (Vienna Red Bean Milk Dinner Roll) and '是優點 也是缺點' (It's a strength, also a weakness). (3) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the dialogue into Chinese. Labels like '$219' and '1顆12塊' (12 dollars per piece) are displayed to provide price context.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Unboxing at home -> Detailed tasting and critique.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 female passerby, and 1 male shopper visible in the background at Costco.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman in a black beret and grey off-the-shoulder top; another woman in a black and white patterned bucket hat and white tank top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The store background shows industrial bakery racks and refrigerated display cases. The home background features a modern living room with a couch, table, and warm lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Bright overhead warehouse lighting and warm, soft indoor domestic lighting.

foodsDetect: Vienna Red Bean Milk Dinner Rolls

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Tasting -> Critical Analysis -> Final Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a consumer food review of a specific Costco bakery item. It aims to inform viewers about the product's value, taste profile, and quality (noting the discrepancy between the bread's soft texture and the insufficient amount of filling) to help them decide whether to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Review of a specific retailer's (Costco) house-brand product in a vlog format.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin delivery, frequent use of variety-show style text pop-ups to emphasize points.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The contrast between the positive first impression of the bread's appearance and the critical review of the filling ratio provides a balanced 'honest review' vibe likely intended to build trust with the audience.
